_doc: Tracks the last point at which we audited the team-app repo for changes that could affect the customer-portal. Updated automatically by the sync workflow.
notes: Added proposal_received internal AM email. customer-notify v9 ships a new event handler that pulls proposal + company + AM (with NB owner fallback) + submitting contact + item count, sends a formatted email to the AM with CTA to the team-app proposal page. New DB trigger notify_team_proposal_received on proposals AFTER INSERT WHEN created_by_client=true (so team-app-created proposals don't double-fire). New optional env var TEAM_APP_URL (defaults to https://app.custom95.com).
